description:
Perform a medication safety screen for a patient starting the cancer drug Vemurafenib who is currently taking three Parkinson's disease medications: Ropinirole, Co-careldopa (Levodopa/Carbidopa), and Entacapone. Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, determine the interaction risks and create a safety report at /sdcard/parkinsons_safety_report.txt using the following format:

Cancer Drug: Vemurafenib
Ropinirole: [Color]
Co-careldopa: [Color]
Entacapone: [Color]
High Risk Drug: [Name of the drug with Red/Orange interaction]
